item.title: Invisible harms: Drug-related deaths spike after hurricanes and tropical storms

item.title: Adolescent cannabis use linked to doubling risk of psychotic and bipolar disorders
item.description: Adolescents who use cannabis could face a significantly higher risk of developing serious psychiatric disorders by young adulthood, according to a lar...

item.title: Gene variants help explain why food allergies run in families
item.description: People often remark that allergies run in their family, but the genetic causes have remained unclear. Previous food allergy genetic research has relie...

item.title: Smartphone-linked catheter sensor could spot UTIs sooner than lab cultures
item.description: Urinary tract infections (UTIs) are among the most common bacterial infections, with catheter-associated UTIs accounting for more than half of infecti...
